notes: Over-the-air playbook scripts (roadmap I9). Only additive: extends the hardcoded on-device playbooks. Travel section motivated by State-Dept-style travel advisories bundling tourist scams. No physical-safety claims.

hits.label: fake airline refund via off-official channel
vacation club / timeshare exit advance fee

travel.gemini_snippet: [TRAVEL_OTA] Recent traveler-targeted scripts: airline 'cancelled flight' rebooking-fee texts, fake airline refunds pushed to gift cards, timeshare-exit upfront fees, and travel-insurance claim 'processing fees'. Treat upfront fees, gift-card/wire refunds, and off-official-channel airline/booking support as high risk; tell the user to verify via the airline app or the number on their ticket.

hits.label: task app requires deposit to unlock earnings
pay upfront for job training or equipment

job.gemini_snippet: [JOB_OTA] Watch for task/commission apps that require a deposit or 'recharge' to withdraw, recruiters moving to WhatsApp/Telegram, and any upfront fee for training, equipment, or a background check. Real jobs never charge to get hired.

hits.label: pay tech support in gift cards

tech_support.gemini_snippet: [TECH_OTA] Recent tech-support scams: fake antivirus/subscription 'refunds' that need remote access, and gift-card demands to fix a device. Real companies never cold-call about viruses or refunds.

investment.gemini_snippet: [INVEST_OTA] Pig-butchering pattern: profits shown but a 'tax' or 'fee' is demanded before withdrawal. Paying to withdraw is always a scam.

hits.label: customs fee to release package via link

delivery.gemini_snippet: [DELIVERY_OTA] Smishing: 'your package is held, pay a small customs/redelivery fee via this link.' Carriers never text fee links; track only in the official app.

hits.label: romance partner asks for gift cards

romance.gemini_snippet: [ROMANCE_OTA] Love-bombing then money/gift-card asks, overseas emergency scripts, and crypto pitches from dating contacts. Never send money to someone you have not met in person.

government.gemini_snippet: [GOV_OTA] IRS/SSA impersonators demand gift cards or crypto and threaten arrest or 'SSN suspended'. Real agencies never ask for gift cards; use only official .gov channels.

charity.gemini_snippet: [CHARITY_OTA] Fake disaster-relief and Red Cross appeals that demand gift cards or crypto. Give only via official sites you type yourself.
